testcase.name: API Integration Tests › Leads API › should load leads from API

failure.message: api-integration.spec.js:63:5 should load leads from API

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › api-integration.spec.js:63:5 › API Integration Tests › Leads API › should load leads from API
Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForResponse: Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded.
63 | test('should load leads from API', async ({ page }) => { 64 | // Listen for API request > 65 | const responsePromise = page.waitForResponse(response => | ^ 66 | response.url().includes('/api/leads') && response.status() === 200 67 | ); 68 | at /Applications/Git/crm-frontend/tests/e2e/api-integration.spec.js:65:36
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/api-integration-API-Integr-105d5--should-load-leads-from-API-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/api-integration-API-Integr-105d5--should-load-leads-from-API-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: API Integration Tests › Leads API › should search leads via API

failure.message: api-integration.spec.js:79:5 should search leads via API

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › api-integration.spec.js:79:5 › API Integration Tests › Leads API › should search leads via API

testcase.failure:
